name: acuity_scheduling
description: Connect to Acuity Scheduling to sync appointments, clients, and appointment types into Shielva using your User ID and API Key (BasicAuth).

install_fields.label: User ID
install_fields.description: Your Acuity Scheduling User ID, found in Integrations → API → Credentials.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Acuity Scheduling API Key, found in Integrations → API → Credentials.
